notes: Keep Phase 7 actuation views narrow and queue-oriented.
Reuse existing governance and external-signal databases rather than duplicating action state.

views.name: Ready to Dry Run
views.purpose: Review approved requests that still need a dry run.
views.configure: FILTER "Status" = "Approved"; FILTER "Execution Intent" = "Dry Run"; SORT BY "Requested At" ASC

views.name: Approved for Live
views.purpose: Review approved requests that passed dry run and are ready for serial live execution.
views.configure: FILTER "Status" = "Approved"; FILTER "Execution Intent" = "Ready for Live"; SORT BY "Decided At" ASC

views.name: Executed
views.purpose: Review completed live requests and their linked execution history.

views.name: Actuation Failures
views.purpose: Review requests whose latest execution failed or needs compensation.
views.configure: FILTER "Latest Execution Status" = "Problem"; SHOW "Name", "Policy", "Target Source", "Latest Execution", "Execution Notes"

views.name: Dry Runs
views.purpose: Review dry-run previews, validation outcomes, and idempotency keys.
views.configure: FILTER "Mode" = "Dry Run"; SORT BY "Executed At" DESC

views.name: Live Successes
views.purpose: Review successful live executions and their provider result links.
views.configure: FILTER "Mode" = "Live"; FILTER "Status" = "Succeeded"; SORT BY "Executed At" DESC

views.name: Failures
views.purpose: Review failed executions without re-running blindly.

views.name: Compensation Needed
views.purpose: Review executions that need explicit fix-forward follow-up.
views.configure: FILTER "Status" = "Compensation Needed"; SORT BY "Executed At" DESC

views.name: GitHub Targets Ready
views.purpose: Review mapped GitHub repo sources that are actuation-ready.
